title: galium umbellatum subvar. glabrum
intro: Galium umbellatum subvar. glabrum is a subvariety of the Galium umbellatum plant, a flowering plant native to New Zealand. It has been used in traditional herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and aiding in wound healing. Galium umbellatum subvar. glabrum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
